world.title: AirBaltic will bring more tourism to southern Gran Canaria: four new routes with Poland and Belgium this 2026
world.description: AirBaltic expands its base in Gran Canaria with a second aircraft and four new routes to Poland and Belgium for winter 2026/2027, boosting high-value tourism.

world.title: Railbookers VP identifies rail holidays as Asia’s top trend
world.description: Nick Lim, Vice-President – Asia, Railbookers Group in conversation with Travel Daily Media underscores how curated rail journeys are redefining the way Asia-Pacific travellers experience global destinations. He highlights the growing preference for seamless, experience-driven holidays.

world.description: A rare Eid phone call turns explosive as Imran Khan speaks out from jail, alleging mistreatment of his wife and raising alarm over his own health, deepening the political storm around his imprisonment.

world.description: Seventeen people, including two Singaporeans, were arrested at a Malaysia border checkpoint for immigration offences. Read more at straitstimes.com.

world.title: US prepares to deploy 1,000 airborne troops to Middle East
world.description: WASHINGTON: The US military is preparing to deploy at least 1,000 troops from the 82nd Airborne Division to the Middle East in the coming days, according to three people with knowledge of the move.

business.title: Regional WA shire agrees to sell $22m workers' camp to Westgold Resources
business.description: It was supposed to be a cash cow amid yet another mining boom, but the Shire of Coolgardie is selling its controversial Bluebush Village for $22.05 million, as part of plans to clear massive debts.

science.title: NASA outlines lunar base phases, LEO transition plan and nuclear propulsion mission
science.description: NASA has announced a set of agency-wide initiatives it says are aimed at delivering President Donald J. Trump’s National Space Policy, including changes to its lunar exploration architecture, a revised approach for sustaining a US presence in low Earth orbit (LEO), and a plan to demonstrate nuclear electric propulsion on a Mars-bound spacecraft.

science.title: Negative ions found on moon solve old mystery
science.description: In a first for space exploration, a Chinese-led research team has detected negative hydrogen ions on the moon's surface, solving a long-standing mystery on how the solar wind interacts with airless celestial bodies.

science.title: NASA Abandons Its Ambitious Lunar Space Station in Major Shake-Up
science.description: NASA's chief on Tuesday said the US space agency will invest $20 billion to develop a base on the Moon, while suspending its plans to create the lunar orbital space station known as Gateway.

science.title: Scientists just solved a major mystery about how your brain stores memories
science.description: Scientists have found that your brain separates memories into “what” and “where/when” using two different groups of neurons. One set responds to specific objects or people, while another tracks the context or situation. When you remember something correctly, these groups briefly connect and reconstruct the full memory. This system may be the secret behind how we recognize the same things across totally different experiences.

science.title: Plants Halt Growth to Survive Stress

science.title: AI approach uncovers dozens of hidden planets in NASA's TESS data
science.description: Astronomers at the University of Warwick have validated over 100 exoplanets, including 31 newly detected planets, using a new artificial intelligence tool applied to data from NASA's Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite (TESS), a space mission that monitors the sky for the subtle dimming of starlight caused when planets pass in front of their host stars.

science.title: Study Finds Europe’s Neanderthals Descended from a Single Population
science.description: New PNAS research suggests Europe’s late Neanderthals largely came from a single population that expanded from southwestern France.

ai.title: Rising AI Firm Anthropic Battles Pentagon's Security Risk Label
ai.description: A federal judge is evaluating the Pentagon's designation of AI company Anthropic as a security threat. The move stemmed from concerns about Anthropic's AI use in autonomous weapons, leading to legal action by the firm against the Trump administration. A ruling is expected by the end of the week.

ai.title: Apple iPhone iOS 26.4 update brings eight new emojis
ai.description: Along with eight new emojis, the latest Apple iPhone and iPad software update includes new Apple Music features such as AI-generated playlists.

ai.title: OpenAI Shuts Down Sora AI Video Generator And Ends Disney Partnership As It Refocuses On ChatGPT And New Spud Model
ai.description: OpenAI ends its Sora video generator and Disney deal, streamlining products to focus on AI agents, new model Spud, and reorganised safety teams.

ai.title: I would hire the AI user: AI skills redefine jobs, says NVIDIA CEO
ai.description: In a recent podcast, Lex Fridman spoke with Jensen Huang, who highlighted which job roles are taking centre stage. He said he would prefer to hire candidates skilled in AI, adding that everyone, from farmers to teachers, should know how to use it.
